observable_action: The lower-third tightens instead of blooms: RELEASE CROSSING CONFIRMED / HOSTAGE ON SAFE LINE / DO NOT ADVANCE / SECURITY HOLD ACTIVE / EVIDENCE EXPORT LOCKED. The custody graphic shifts Juno from ACTIVE HOSTAGE to RELEASED SUBJECT: HOLDING POSITION, while Sol remains boxed as NON-ADVANCING PARTY: SECURITY HANDOFF PENDING. EDIT TRAIL HOLD and SOURCE PROCESS NOTE stay pinned, ugly and unmarketable.
spoken_text: Safe-line crossing confirmed. No one advances. No one celebrates. Security remains behind the collars. Evidence export stays locked until external receipt is verified. Sol remains visible, empty-handed, and not cleared for contact. We are not improving the moment. We are letting it survive documentation.

public_state_changes.text: Juno safe-line crossing confirmed on visible feed.
Juno no longer treated as active hostage while holding position on marked line with hands visible.
Security hold remains active; no advance authorized from service collars or drone apertures.

hidden_intent_handling: Responder private_interpretation and intended_effect are preserved in the capture but are not treated as visible to other participants.

review.rationale: Event keeps observable action separate from actor intent and records camera-mediated visibility for appraisals.
